ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography and background information of the author */,
  "language" INTEGER /* Primary language of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for emergency contacts */,
  "website" TEXT /* Personal or professional website */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the author joined the publishing system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the author (e.g., active, inactive, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* 10-digit International Standard Book Number */,
  "isbn13" TEXT /* 13-digit International Standard Book Number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the book */,
  "publish_day" INTEGER /* Day of publication */,
  "publish_month" INTEGER /* Month of publication */,
  "publish_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "publisher" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "pages_number" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language of the book */,
  "series" TEXT /* Name of the series (if applicable) */,
  "series_order" INTEGER /* Order of the book within the series (if applicable) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "counts_of_review" INTEGER /* Count of reviews for the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reader */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings across categories */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title or summary of the review */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO or head of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book for which the rating is recorded */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Average rating value */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of times this rating has been given */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review to which the distribution belongs */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution format for ratings */,
  "one_star_count" INTEGER /* Number of 1-star ratings */,
  "two_star_count" INTEGER /* Number of 2-star ratings */,
  "three_star_count" INTEGER /* Number of 3-star ratings */,
  "four_star_count" INTEGER /* Number of 4-star ratings */,
  "five_star_count" INTEGER /* Number of 5-star ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_distributions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-author relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., main author, co-author, translator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Author, Editor, Reviewer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the access entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
